prose: Frontier orbital calculation on water (H₂O) at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard', exact four-centre integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell singlet, RKS). Single-point on the supplied geometry at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz (not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed. HOMO = −8.6037183 eV (index 4), LUMO = +0.33695037 eV (index 5). Headline value: HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV. Total energy: −76.462901 Hartree / −2080.6615 eV. Koopmans-derived vertical IP = 8.6037183 eV, vertical EA = −0.33695037 eV, chemical hardness η = 4.4703343 eV, electronegativity χ = 4.133384 eV, softness σ = 0.22369691 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index ω = 1.9109156 eV. Output JSON written to water_frontier_dft.json. No warnings from the engine (warnings array empty).
